scope.notes: 7 experiments (E1-E7), general 'small brain circuits' framing, control-estimation tradeoff thesis, CPG detection as novel contribution.

literature.notes: 20 references. Gemini 2.5 Pro v2 lit review. Cites Pillow GLM, transfer entropy, Price/Stein, Marder CPGs, Ahrens zebrafish, Quadrato organoids.

theory.notes: GPT-5.4 verified. Price theorem (Eq 7) correct. E1=W(D-I) simplification. Identifiability K>=log(N²/δ)/p².

experiment.notes: All 7 experiments (E1-E7) at consistent N=15 baseline (66% meas, stim=1.0, 50 reps, 50 instances). Measurement noise parameter in core.py. E6 oracle: approx always wins. E7 stimulation fraction added.

analyze.notes: 10 figures in paper (fig1-fig10). All regenerated 2026-03-24 from fresh E1-E7 data. Tol palette, CI shading, composite panels.

write.notes: ~630 lines (10 main + 3 appendix). ALL numbers verified against fresh data 2026-03-24. 20 citations. Noise robustness paragraph. CPG detection paragraph. 5-point limitations. r=0.96.

review.notes: Full numerical audit 2026-03-24: all paper claims match current JSON data files. All 10 figures regenerated from fresh experiment runs.
